PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?consort ?consortLabel ?monarch ?monarchLabel WHERE {
  ?position wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q761752 .
  ?position wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q46 .
  ?monarch p:P39 ?posStmt .
  ?posStmt ps:P39 ?position .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?posStmt pq:P582 ?endTime .
  }
  ?monarch wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?monarch p:P26 ?spouseStmt .
  ?spouseStmt ps:P26 ?consort .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?spouseStmt pq:P582 ?spouseEndTime .
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?consort wdt:P53 ?family .
    ?family wdt:P31 wd:Q6634093 .
  }
  ?consort rdfs:label ?consortLabel .
  ?monarch rdfs:label ?monarchLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?consortLabel) = 'en' && LANG(?monarchLabel) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 10
